name: Summer Tech Carnival 2026
description: Annual summer clearance and upgrade push for enterprise cloud bundles.
subject: ☀️ Summer Tech Carnival: Up to 30% Off Enterprise Bundles!
body:
Hello {{name}},

Get ready for our biggest sale of the summer! Access premium developer packages and enterprise servers at unbeatable pricing.

Best,
SaaS Team

name: UPI Autopay Launch Notice
description: Broadcast notice to enable seamless recurring subscription collections using UPI Autopay.
subject: WhatsApp AutoPay Broadcast
body: Hey {{name}}! 👋 Simplify your billing cycles with UPI Autopay. Enable it now and get 5% cashback on your next invoice! Tap below to activate.

name: Inactive Leads Re-engagement
description: Short SMS promo with limited-time high discounting for dormant leads from Q2.
subject: Dormant Leads SMS Promo
body: Hi {{name}}, we miss you! Use code COMEBACK50 for 50% off your next invoice at checkout. Valid till tomorrow. https://saas.io/p/reengage

name: Q2 Customer Appreciation
description: Thank-you tokens, loyalty bonus credits, and feedback solicitations for VIP users.
subject: 🎁 A special thank you from our founders
body:
Dear {{name}},

Thank you for being a premium customer. We have credited ₹5,000 to your ledger balance. Enjoy!

Warm regards,
Founder Desk

name: AI Product Suite Announcement
description: Major launch campaigns detailing new Cognitive AI integration frameworks.
subject: 🤖 Introducing AI Copilots: Automate Your SaaS Core
body:
Hi {{name}},

We are extremely proud to launch our custom AI analytics agent. Get pre-release access inside.
